executives.name: Gary Evans
executives.background: Mr. Evans has served as a director since 2023 and was appointed Chairman and CEO in 2024. He previously served as Chairman and CEO of Evergreen Corporation and has over 40 years of experience in the energy and natural resources sectors.

executives.name: Joe Giamunno
executives.background: Mr. Giamunno was appointed CFO in 2024. He has over 30 years of financial management experience, including roles at various public and private companies in the mining and energy sectors.

executives.name: Russell Lawrence
executives.background: Mr. Lawrence has served as President of the company's antimony operations and was previously the CEO of the company.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Evans
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of United States Antimony Corporation. Former Chairman and CEO of Evergreen Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Hart Baitis
board_of_directors.background: Professional geologist with over 40 years of experience in mineral exploration and development.

board_of_directors.name: Timothy Hasara
board_of_directors.background: Managing Partner and Chief Investment Officer of Sinnet Capital. Over 30 years of experience in investment management.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Neufeld
board_of_directors.background: Extensive experience in corporate finance and strategic planning within the natural resources industry.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 10-K Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
